title: Sorting Items on connect columns
excerpt:
When viewing items in a connect column, they seem to be listed in random order.  I would like to be able to specify the sort order for these items, or at least inherit the sort order saved on the connected board. 
Please…

posts.author: dstupakewicz (Daniel Stupakewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
When viewing items in a connect column, they seem to be listed in random order. I would like to be able to specify the sort order for these items, or at least inherit the sort order saved on the connected board.
Please add your vote to see this feature implemented.

posts.author: laur (Lauren)
posts.cookedHtml: Spoke to support about this today and learned there is a logic to the order, but it’s based on when the connection was first created, with the oldest showing first. Agree the ability to customize the sort would be ideal, but at least having the option for them to reflect the sort order on the connected board, would be extremely helpful.
